LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.description: A deep psychological burden stemming from overwhelming remorse and sorrow caused by being the last remaining member of one's faction. This condition gradually consumes the mind with grief and despair, leading to worsening depression over time.
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.label: guilt
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.0.label: lingering guilt
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.1.label: growing remorse
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.2.label: deep regret
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.3.label: crushing guilt
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.4.label: tormenting sorrow
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.5.label: despairing isolation
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.6.label: guilt (acceptance)
